result:
React re-renders child by default when parent re-renders.
No memo check — just runs function again.

Fix options:
- wrap child in React.memo → skips render if props shallow-equal
- stabilize props parent passes: useMemo for objects/arrays, useCallback for fns (new refs each render break memo)
- lift state down or split component so parent updates don't touch child subtree
- pass primitives not fresh object literals ({foo: 1} is new every render)

Most common culprit: memo'd child + parent passing inline {} or () => {} → memo useless because prop identity changes every render.

Check with React DevTools Profiler → "why did this render" shows which prop changed.
